summary: Frontend-only validation completed for roadmap additions: Settings quick tools, Offline Center, Safari Diagnostics, Home quick resume cards, Stats enhancements, and Recitation pause tolerance/start flow. Smoke checks on existing routes passed.
action_items: Optional: add data-testid attributes for additional header/navigation controls (e.g., Stats and Settings back/actions) to improve long-term e2e reliability.
Optional: split very large page components to reduce regression risk and improve maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage.tsx (~2380 lines) exceeds maintainable size and increases regression probability for future changes.
RecitationTestPage.tsx (~1000 lines) and SurahReaderPage.tsx (~800 lines) are large, making feature coupling and debugging harder.
Not all interactive controls across tested screens expose data-testid, reducing deterministic test coverage depth.
test_credentials: Missing: /app/memory/test_credentials.md was not found in workspace (not blocking for this frontend non-auth scope).
seed_data_creation: LocalStorage seeded during UI run: wise-last-reading, wise-last-listening, wise-last-read for quick resume card verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated with Playwright at http://127.0.0.1:3000. Confirmed all requested routes/features render and interact: Settings quick tools, Offline Center controls, Safari Diagnostics history logging, Home separate quick-resume cards, Stats weekly/memorization cards, and Recitation pause tolerance + start transition to recording controls. Existing routes /prayer, /azkar, /qibla also loaded without blocking errors.
rca of the issue: No blocking regression reproduced in requested scope. Initial automation failure was test-selector locale mismatch (English text selector on Arabic UI), resolved by switching to stable data-testid selectors.
